name: Delilah
description:
Delilah is a often stern, introverted girl

who very much doesn't like people,

she is also lesbian, and has one lover Kia (Lila) <3
She Wears Often Hoodies, or a Jacket, most of which are black or white

she sometimes wheres a skirt, or dress, or jeans <3
